KOKODI
Kokodi Mask

Welcome to Kokodi, World Without Adults.

Kokodi is third-person fantasy extraction shooter, set in a magical world inspired by Legend of Zelda and Genshin Impact with unique design elements borrowed from Japanese anime. The game is built using modern development technologies, featuring fast-paced PVP & team battles, with seamless web3 integration, powered by fast and secure blockchain.


Wallet Checker link: https://wl.kokodi.io/
